questions.question: What is the primary method used for inter-process communication (IPC) that allows multiple threads within a single process to share data, and which is supported by operating systems, including the use of shared memory and message passing?
questions.hint: Explain the two methods of IPC

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a method of inter-process communication (IPC) used for multi-threaded programming?
What is the primary advantage of using semaphores for inter-process communication (IPC) in multi-threaded programming?
